events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes spool erection & fit-up where flange bolt-hole rotation is wrong (two-holing missed). This is a non-compliance with standard piping practice. The work is rough-complete, 70% complete until defects corrected.

Decision: fail (non-compliant - two-holing missed is a fit-up defect)
Risk: medium (flange misalignment can cause leaks but not immediately dangerous)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: 70
Value: 0 (not asked for a numeric reading)
Confidence: high, say 0.9
Findings: flange bolt-hole rotation wrong, two-holing missed
Actions: rework flange orientation, correct bolt-hole alignment, re-inspect
References: ASME B31.3, project iso drawings
